body:
tungsten-forge v2.0 -- PASS 1, STAGE 1 CHECKPOINT

Installed tungsten-forge-v2-SKILL.md (overwrote nothing -- v1.0 was never installed). Read in full.

Stage -1: no forge_ledger.json existed. Seeded one at MQL4/Files/forge_ledger.json (XM Global demo terminal). This is genuinely pass 1.

Stage 0 (real data, not narrative): parsed the actual EURUSD5.hst from the XM Global demo terminal -- 121,276 M5 bars, 2024-11-14 to 2026-07-03. Computed driftZ=0.624 (driftless, consistent with your 0.99 on a different window -- both agree SYMMETRIC/driftless). p55|priceChange20|=0.000638 vs your cited 0.00065 -- matches, confirms same instrument class. Full percentile table for priceChange20/50, EMA200 disp/ATR, delta20-disp is in the ledger. One honest gap: median spread/ATR is UNMEASURABLE from this history -- every stored spread field is 0 across all 121k bars (MT4 doesn't backfill live spread into .hst). Flagged, not faked as zero-cost.

Stage 1 (H1/H2 static sweep of SLS(28), 55,170 lines): found 18 gate/clamp sites, not 8 -- 8 are true ILLEGAL_ABSOLUTE live gates (break-even buffer, min tolerance, range/stop-distance gates, doubleBottom tolerance, pipDist, 3x ema21Angle degree cutpoints including the one you named at line 32695), and the rest are degenerate-distribution ATR/spread fallback guards (candidates for Form-1 exemption, not confirmed offenders). Real fire-rate/bind-rate numbers still need runtime instrumentation -- static analysis alone can't produce those honestly, that's next.

Proceeding to Stage 2 (threshold legality sweep + warrants) now, no compile this pass per Manuel's instruction -- compile happens on pass 2.
